title: Crashfish Mod
description: Simple mod made by MCreator that adds the Crashfish from Subnautica. It will swim up to you and then explode.
body: This mod adds the Crashfish from Subnautica into Minecraft. It spawns in all ocean biomes, except frozen ones, and if the player gets within it's range, it will begin to chase. Once close enough to the player, it will explode, dealing about half your health if you are unarmored. It has the model of the Pufferfish but with custom textures. If you want to add a little challenge to your world, take these little creepers of the ocean. This is also my **first ever mod**, so don't expect complex behaviors. Thanks for reading!
